data.title: Add Inter font and update --font-sans token

data.body:
Surfaced by FRAC-19's gap analysis + decisions doc (decision #1).

Why: DESIGN.md declares colors.font-sans = "Inter, system-ui, sans-serif"
but src/index.css line 6 still has --font-sans = "JetBrains Mono".
This is intentional drift documented in DESIGN.md's Typography prose
("Inter declared, not yet implemented"). This task closes the gap.

Files:
- index.html (add Google Font <link> for Inter)
  OR src/index.css if we self-host (decide during planning)
- src/index.css line 6: --font-sans value swap

Scope: small (~5-10 LOC, 1-2 files). Visual impact will be noticeable
since the body switches from JetBrains Mono to Inter on any element
that uses font-sans (currently the same as font-mono — confirm grep).
Mobile-first 375px baseline still applies.

DESIGN.md already declares the canonical value; this task aligns code
with DESIGN.md.

PASS. Reviewed cold against plan.

Diff: 1 file (src/index.css), 2 lines changed (1 @import, 1 --font-sans value). Exactly matches plan scope.

Line 1: Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700 inserted alphabetically between Fraunces and Jacquard 24. All 3 original families preserved (Fraunces ital+wght axes, Jacquard 24, JetBrains Mono wght 100-700).

Line 6: --font-sans: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; (correct fallback chain matching DESIGN.md line 39).

Untouched (verified via grep): --font-mono = 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; --font-serif = 'Fraunces', serif;. No other tokens modified.

Forbidden files: none touched. Diff scope = src/index.css only.

Validation results (applied PR file locally, restored after):
- pnpm typecheck: clean
- pnpm build: clean (3.57s, 2778 modules)
- pnpm test: 143 passed / 4 failed — matches documented baseline exactly. Failures: footer Jacquard x2 (italic + Jacquard 24 font), navbar mobile abbreviation, neighborhood min-h-screen layout. No new failures.

DESIGN.md cross-check (line 38-41, 192-197): font-sans token spec is 'Inter, system-ui, sans-serif' — PR matches. font-mono = JetBrains Mono unchanged — PR matches. DESIGN.md line 194 explicitly anticipates this exact swap as a 'cleanup task'. No weight pins contradicting 300;400;500;600;700.

PRD: not re-validated in this review (planner already flagged FRAC-22 line 84 stale-but-not-blocking per FRAC-19).

Visual check (375px Inter loading): skipped — env constraints, build artifact already confirms @import URL is well-formed Google Fonts v2 CSS API.

Concerns / non-blockers:
1. Weight overload: 5 weights (300-700) for Inter is generous. Actual body text usage may only need 400/500/600 — but DESIGN.md doesn't pin weights, so this is acceptable headroom. No size cost concern (Google Fonts variable serving).
2. FOUT possible since @import is render-blocking-ish but display=swap is set, so falls back to system-ui until Inter loads — graceful.
3. JetBrains Mono is still the body text in practice (DESIGN.md line 195) — swapping --font-sans doesn't auto-migrate existing surfaces. That migration is out of scope per plan; this PR only swaps the token.

Verdict: PASS. Moving to done.
